description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a prominent dark gray gable roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior walls are primarily white, accented by large windows and a blue front door. The house is surrounded by a low black fence and features a patterned yard with alternating stripes and triangles in green, white, and black. The front facade includes a covered balcony on the upper floor and a sheltered entryway below. The windows are arranged in horizontal bands, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, with sharp lines and a focus on symmetry.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark gable roof, white walls, large windows, and a patterned yard enclosed by a black fence.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main entryway, blue door, upper balcony, and patterned yard behind a black fence.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the large gable roof, geometric yard patterns, and the full perimeter of the black fence.
description_view_2: Direct front view displaying the main entrance, balcony, and the symmetrical arrangement of windows and yard patterns.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing a row of windows on the lower floor and the continuation of the patterned yard and fence.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a blue door, covered by the upper balcony, and accessed via a paved path through the patterned yard.
